entries.result: Rusty Dagger — a pitted iron blade wrapped in frayed leather. 1d4 damage. Worth 2 gp.
Shortsword — a straight double-edged blade, well-balanced. 1d6 damage. Worth 10 gp.
Longsword — a sturdy blade forged for battle, nicked but serviceable. 1d8 damage. Worth 15 gp.
Battleaxe — a heavy iron head on a stout haft, scarred from many fights. 1d8 damage. Worth 10 gp.
Greataxe — a massive wedge of steel on a haft as thick as a wrist. 1d12 damage. Worth 30 gp.
Warhammer — a blunt instrument of justice, its head dented from use. 1d8 damage. Worth 15 gp.
Mace — a spiked iron head on a wooden shaft, simple and effective. 1d6 damage. Worth 5 gp.
Quarterstaff — a stout length of ash, smooth from handling. 1d6 damage. Worth 2 sp.
Handaxe — a small throwing axe, balanced for the toss. 1d6 damage. Worth 5 gp.
Spear — a long wooden shaft with a leaf-shaped iron tip. 1d6 damage. Worth 1 gp.
Halberd — a polearm with an axe blade and a spike, reach weapon. 1d10 damage. Worth 20 gp.
Greatsword — a massive blade requiring two hands, its edge gleaming. 2d6 damage. Worth 50 gp.
Rapier — a slender, elegant blade for thrusting. 1d8 damage. Worth 25 gp.
Scimitar — a curved blade with a sharp edge, light and fast. 1d6 damage. Worth 25 gp.
Whip — a braided leather lash that can strike at distance. 1d4 damage. Worth 2 gp.
Flail — a spiked ball on a chain, unpredictable and brutal. 1d8 damage. Worth 10 gp.
Shortbow — a curved bow of yew, string taut. 1d6 damage. Worth 25 gp.
Longbow — a tall bow of layered wood, equal to the range. 1d8 damage. Worth 50 gp.
Crossbow — a mechanical bow mounted on a stock, slow but powerful. 1d8 damage. Worth 50 gp.
Dagger — a sharp, double-edged blade, easily concealed. 1d4 damage. Worth 2 gp.
Padded Armor — thick quilting that muffles sound. AC 11. Worth 5 gp.
Leather Armor — cured hide stiffened by boiling. AC 11. Worth 10 gp.
Studded Leather — leather armor reinforced with metal rivets. AC 12. Worth 45 gp.
Hide Armor — thick furs and rough leather, primitive but tough. AC 12. Worth 10 gp.
Chain Shirt — a shirt of interlocked metal rings. AC 13. Worth 50 gp.
Scale Mail — overlapping metal scales on a leather backing. AC 14. Worth 50 gp.
Breastplate — a fitted metal plate covering the torso. AC 14. Worth 400 gp.
Half Plate — a breastplate with partial leg and arm guards. AC 15. Worth 750 gp.
Ring Mail — leather with sewn-in metal rings. AC 14. Worth 30 gp.
Chain Mail — a full suit of interlocking rings, heavy but protective. AC 16. Worth 75 gp.
Splint Armor — vertical metal strips riveted to a cloth backing. AC 17. Worth 200 gp.
Plate Armor — interlocking steel plates covering the body. AC 18. Worth 1500 gp.
Wooden Shield — a simple plank of oak with iron bands. +2 AC. Worth 10 gp.
Metal Shield — a steel shield embossed with a crest. +2 AC. Worth 20 gp.
Potion of Healing — a crimson liquid that mends wounds. Restores 2d4+2 HP. Worth 50 gp.
Potion of Greater Healing — a bright red potion, bubbling softly. Restores 4d4+4 HP. Worth 150 gp.
Potion of Mana — a blue effervescent fluid. Restores 2d4 spell levels. Worth 100 gp.
Potion of Strength — a murky brown liquid that tastes of iron. Grants +2 STR for 1 hour. Worth 100 gp.
Potion of Invisibility — a clear liquid that bends light. Invisible for 1 hour. Worth 200 gp.
Potion of Speed — a golden liquid that fizzes. Grants Haste for 1 minute. Worth 150 gp.
Potion of Flying — a feather-light silvery liquid. Grants flight for 1 hour. Worth 250 gp.
Oil of Slipperiness — a thick, greasy oil. Covers a creature or surface with extreme slipperiness. Worth 100 gp.
Antidote — a bitter green liquid that neutralizes most poisons. Worth 50 gp.
Potion of Darkvision — a black liquid with glittering specks. Grants darkvision 60ft for 1 hour. Worth 100 gp.
Ring of Protection — a plain silver band that wards off harm. +1 AC and saving throws. Worth 500 gp.
Ring of Feather Falling — a ring set with a blue stone. No damage from falls. Worth 500 gp.
Amulet of Health — a golden amulet set with a ruby. Grants CON 19 while worn. Worth 1000 gp.
Cloak of Elvenkind — a grey-green cloak that shifts with the shadows. Advantage on Stealth. Worth 500 gp.
Boots of Striding and Springing — worn leather boots that feel oddly light. Doubles movement and jump distance. Worth 500 gp.
Gauntlets of Ogre Power — heavy iron gauntlets. Sets STR to 19 while worn. Worth 800 gp.
Headband of Intellect — a silver circlet set with a sapphire. Sets INT to 19 while worn. Worth 800 gp.
Bracers of Archery — leather bracers etched with bow motifs. +2 to ranged attack rolls. Worth 500 gp.
Wand of Magic Detection — a slender wand of polished yew. Detects magic within 30ft. 7 charges. Worth 300 gp.
Scroll of Fireball — a scroll inscribed with arcane symbols. Casts Fireball at 3rd level. Single use. Worth 150 gp.
Scroll of Invisibility — a scroll that seems to fade at the edges. Casts Invisibility. Single use. Worth 100 gp.
Scroll of Cure Wounds — a scroll bearing a prayer symbol. Casts Cure Wounds at 2nd level. Single use. Worth 100 gp.
Enchanted Dagger +1 — a dagger with a faint blue rune on the blade. +1 to attack and damage. Worth 300 gp.
Enchanted Longsword +1 — a blade that hums softly. +1 to attack and damage. Worth 500 gp.
Enchanted Bow +1 — a bow carved from shimmering wood. +1 to attack and damage. Worth 500 gp.
Enchanted Shield +1 — a shield with a gleaming edge. +1 to AC. Worth 500 gp.
Rope (50ft) — a sturdy hempen coil, useful for climbing and binding. Worth 1 gp.
Torches (10) — resin-soaked pine torches that burn for 1 hour each. Worth 5 sp.
Bedroll — a wool blanket rolled tight with leather straps. Worth 1 gp.
Rations (10 days) — dried meat, hardtack, and preserved fruit. Worth 5 gp.
Waterskin — a cured leather bladder holding a gallon. Worth 2 sp.
Tinderbox — flint, steel, and dry tinder in a small pouch. Worth 5 sp.
Crowbar — an iron bar with a forked end, excellent for levering. Worth 2 gp.
Grappling Hook — an iron hook with three flukes, tied to rope. Worth 2 gp.
Hammer and Pitons (10) — a small hammer and iron spikes for climbing. Worth 1 gp.
Lantern — a hooded brass lantern that casts bright light in a 30ft cone. Worth 5 gp.
Healer's Kit — a leather pouch of bandages and salves. 10 uses. Worth 5 gp.
Small Pouch of Garnets — a handful of deep red garnets, unpolished. Worth 100 gp.
Silver Necklace — a delicate chain with a polished moonstone. Worth 75 gp.
Gold Ring — a simple gold band, unadorned but heavy. Worth 50 gp.
Small Statuette — a jade figurine of a crouching panther. Worth 150 gp.
Gold Coins (50) — a clinking pouch of freshly minted gold coins. Worth 50 gp.
Platinum Coins (20) — rare platinum coins stamped with an ancient king's face. Worth 200 gp.
Enchanted Amulet of Dark Whispers — a black amulet that occasionally murmurs secrets. Grants advantage on Insight but attracts undead. Worth 1200 gp.
Vorpal Dagger — a jagged blade that seems to drink light. On a critical hit, severs a limb. Worth 2000 gp.
Staff of the Magi — a towering staff of black wood with a crystal orb. Holds 50 charges for spellcasting. Worth 5000 gp.
Orb of Dragonkind — a crystal sphere the size of a fist, pulsing with inner fire. Grants control over dragons of a specific kind. Worth 10000 gp.
